<script>
function RedirectToUrl(url)
{
  window.open(
    "/Cover/RedirectToSecureUrl?url=" + encodeURIComponent(url),
    "_blank"
  );
}

function RedirectToUrl2(url)
{
 var con = confirm('Bạn có chắc chắn không?');
 if (con == false) return;
  window.open(
    "/Cover/RedirectToSecureUrl?url=" + encodeURIComponent(url),
    "_blank"
  );
}
</script>
